message:
Fix unescaped quotes in install script TQL pipeline

The embedded TQL code had unescaped double quotes around "tenzir"
which caused shell parsing issues, resulting in:
  sh: 270: Syntax error: end of file unexpected (expecting "fi")

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
